playback_order: Noun plural or verb forms, slow
fixes: Playback screen text and pronunciation now use the same exact p.text object.
Playback no longer calls normal card rendering after setting a spoken step, so the Card front dropdown cannot overwrite the screen.
Cache-busting v8 URLs were added for app.js, data.js, styles.css, manifest, icon, and service worker.
Card tapping is disabled during playback so it cannot flip to another side while audio is running.
The Abteilung test sequence now displays and speaks: die Abteilung, then die Abteilungen, then department, then بخش؛ دیپارتمنت.
